task.description: Create L1_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY_v2.md documenting attribution rules for L1 work.

parsed.edit_description: Update L1_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY_v2.md to add L1 work attribution rules based on the new L1 work model.
patch_commands: sed -i 's/.*L1 work.*$/L1 work attribution rules based on the new L1 work model./' docs/05-OPERATIONS/L1_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY_v2.md
validation_commands: grep -q 'L1 work attribution rules based on the new L1 work model.' docs/05-OPERATIONS/L1_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY_v2.md
parsed.expected_outcome: L1_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY_v2.md now contains the new L1 work attribution rules.
parsed.risk_notes: No risk. This is a straightforward documentation update.
